nasb.text: David replied, “Behold the spear of the king! Now let one of the young men come over and take it.

esv.text: And David answered and said, “Here is the spear, O king! Let one of the young men come over and take it.

cnv.text: 大衛回答說：“看哪！王的矛在這裡，可以叫一個僕人過來拿去。

ccb.text: 大卫答道：“王的矛在这里，请派一个人来拿回去吧。
